data.content:
Planning handoff:
- Root cause candidate: history session/row labels are derived from session-start agent fields, while the failing response message already carries provider identity in response metadata (`part.metadata.openrouter`).
- Implementation should add response-level identity parsing and make the history UI prefer that metadata-derived label over session-start fallback fields.
- Keep the change scoped to the displayed agent label only; do not alter timestamps, workflow badges, prompt numbering, or history navigation behavior.
- Cover the regression with parser/history tests using an OpenRouter-backed response fixture and expand shared label tests if formatting helpers change.
